behavior: Social, omnivorous ground-forager; often forages in flocks and gives short nasal calls.
field_marks: Entirely black plumage, often with a subtle green-purple sheen
Broad, fingered wings with slightly pointed tips
habitat: Wetlands and water-associated habitats including shorelines, estuaries, marshes, swamps, rivers, lakes, ponds, and adjacent woodland; also uses urban and agricultural areas.

sources.title: Fish Crow Identification — All About Birds
